case.title: SENIOR v. ZONING COMMISSION OF NEW CANAAN

opinion.h1: SENIOR v. ZONING COMMISSION OF NEW CANAAN, 363 U.S. 143 (1960)
opinion.h4: SENIOR v. ZONING COMMISSION OF NEW CANAAN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ERRORS OF CONNECTICUT. No. 620. Decided May 31, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Raymond T. Benedict, Morgan P. Ames, Francis J. McNamara, Jr. and John F. Spindler for appellant.
Ira E. Hicks, Norwick R. G. Goodspeed, John C. Sturges and Samuel A. Gilliland for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
363 U.S. 143 GARFINKLE v. GARFINKLE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 799, Misc. Decided May 31, 1960.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
